summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of beauty salon booking application completed. Backend APIs tested with 91.7% success rate. Frontend booking flow working completely. Admin interface accessible with minor form validation issue.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of expected 201 for appointment creation
minor_issues.impact: Minor API inconsistency - functionality works correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Password confirmation validation shows error even with matching passwords

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all elements
Complete booking flow (service selection, date/time, client info, confirmation)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin registration form password confirmation validation logic to properly accept matching passwords
